mapper.insert:
SELECT SQ_JEHU_SUGGESTION_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO NMCP_JEHU_SUGGESTION ( JEHU_SEQ, JEHU_TITLE, JEHU_COMPANY_NM, JEHU_REG_NM, JEHU_REG_DT, JEHU_ANSWER_STAT, JEHU_MOBILE_NO, JEHU_EMAIL, JEHU_CONTENT, JEHU_PRI_AGREE_YN, JEHU_CATEGORY ) VALUES ( #{jehuSeq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{jehuTitle}, #{jehuCompanyNm}, #{jehuRegNm}, SYSDATE, 'A', #{jehuMobileNo}, #{jehuEmail}, #{jehuContent}, #{jehuPriAgreeYn}, #{jehuCategory} )
